title: darea rutifolia
intro: Darea rutifolia, also known as Dara or Pukhraj, is a plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae. It is a perennial climber with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Darea rutifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and bronchitis.
